class.name: PuertsQuickjsBackend
class.brief_description: Backend resource for running ECMAScript through QuickJS.
class.description: Instantiate [PuertsQuickjsBackend] and pass it to [method PuertsEnvironment.initialize] to create a Puerts environment backed by QuickJS.

method.name: is_available
method.description: Returns whether this backend is available in the current build.

method.name: supports_tick
method.description: Returns [code]false[/code] because the QuickJS backend does not require [method PuertsEnvironment.tick].

method.name: supports_debugger
method.description: Returns [code]false[/code] because the QuickJS backend does not expose remote debugging here.

method.name: supports_low_memory_notification
method.description: Returns [code]true[/code] because the QuickJS backend supports low-memory notifications.

method.name: supports_terminate_execution
method.description: Returns [code]false[/code] because the QuickJS backend does not support forced script termination.

method.name: _puerts_get_functions_ptr
method.description: Returns an internal pointer to the Puerts backend function table. This method exists for extension internals. Do not call it from gameplay code.
